case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. CARLOS KU GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,854.89 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS KU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS KU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS KU $1,854.89 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,014.89, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN BALANCE OWED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FORM (MC-040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA DOMINGUEZ, COLLECTIONS ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS KU
